title: roettlera sinensis
intro: Roettlera sinensis, also known as Chinese Angelica or Dong Quai, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Roettlera sinensis include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and improve cardiovascular health. Roettlera sinensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and dried roots, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
